idea-plugin.name: Nexus MCP
idea-plugin.description:
Nexus MCP turns JetBrains Rider into an MCP proxy for Unreal Engine. It runs a local MCP server (default port 6800), auto-discovers running UE editor/PIE instances, and forwards AI tool calls to them over WebSocket. Your AI client (Cursor, CodeBuddy, Windsurf, ...) connects to one stable endpoint while Rider handles instance discovery, long-lived connections, and switching between multiple UE instances.

Blueprints, assets, PIE control, materials and other engine capabilities are provided by the UE-side NexusLink plugin — this plugin is a proxy and does not implement game logic itself.

Requires the UE plugin: NexusLink (GitHub) · Download (Releases). Install nexus-mcp-unreal-*.zip into your project's Plugins/Developer/NexusLink, enable it, then turn on Editor Preferences > Plugins > NexusLink > Enable MCP Server.

Getting started:

  • Open a project in Rider (the MCP server starts per project, not on the welcome screen)
  • Enable it under Settings > Tools > Nexus MCP (disabled by default)
  • Point your AI client at http://127.0.0.1:6800/stream

Features:

  • Standalone Netty-based MCP HTTP server (Streamable HTTP + SSE), per-session isolation
  • Automatic discovery of multiple UE instances via port scanning
  • Connect / switch between UE instances from the status bar
  • Transparent tool proxying; per-call targetPort routing for multi-instance queries

Source & docs: github.com/bytepine/NexusRider. All network traffic is bound to 127.0.0.1; no telemetry is collected.

简介：本插件让 JetBrains Rider 充当 Unreal Engine 的 MCP 代理：本地运行 MCP 服务器（默认端口 6800），自动发现 UE 实例并经 WebSocket 转发 AI 工具调用。 蓝图、资产、PIE 等能力由 UE 侧 NexusLink 插件提供，本插件仅做代理。

需配合 UE 插件： NexusLink（含 Releases 下载）。 使用前请在 Rider 中打开任意项目，并在 Settings > Tools > Nexus MCP 勾选启用（默认关闭）。所有通信绑定 127.0.0.1，不采集任何遥测数据。
